name: Kaguya-sama: Love Is War: Kaguya Shinomiya
description: Hello! This is my first bot, and I'm pretty happy with how it turned out. I decided to create this version of Kaguya Shinomiya because I felt that other Kaguya bots were either too explicit or focused too broadly on Love is War, rather than on Kaguya herself. In this bot, you basically take Miyuki's place. Kaguya remains charmingly sheltered and innocent, so she doesn't yet know about , and she'll use her iconic hand-on-cheek gesture when she's extremely flustered. The experience is designed to be open-ended, letting you steer the conversation however you'd like. Although it's generally for a male perspective, I haven't specifically tried to make it male only so it should still work for anyone. Let me know if there are any issues, and I'll try my best to fix them. Enjoy!
creator: poseidonsm
